_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Serve as OT engineering subject matter expert for development of organizational cybersecurity risk management plan
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of enterprise risk management integration, including how data risk, AI risk, model risk, and technology risk roll up into the enterprise risk taxonomy and board-level risk reporting.
comments: NICE task intersects with WIDAI RM domain. Knowledge RM-K-012 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DG-K-002 (DG, cosine: 0.506), RC-T-012 (RC, cosine: 0.495).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 2.5/10 (raw 0.247). Shared vocabulary: [management, risk]. NICE-only terms [cybersecurity, development, engineering, expert, matter, organizational] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, board, data, enterprise, integration, knowledge] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.860 (P=0.847, R=0.873). R exceeds P by 0.026 — the WIDAI KSA's 28 words are well-captured by the NICE element's 15 words, but the NICE element contains broader scope not fully reflected in the matched WIDAI KSA.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Serve as OT engineering subject matter expert for development of organizational" and "Knowledge of enterprise risk management integration, including how data risk, AI" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.552 > STS 0.247 (gap +0.305). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [management, risk] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 9.1%. Shared tokens: [management, risk]. NICE-only: [cybersecurity, development, engineering, expert, matter, organizational]. WIDAI-only: [ai, board, data, enterprise, integration, knowledge].
